name: @types/node
usage_summary: The e2e package uses Node.js built-in APIs extensively: 'path' and 'fs' are imported directly in setup/env.ts, and NodeJS.ProcessEnv is referenced as a global type. At least 10 e2e source files reference Node.js globals (process, Buffer, path, fs, child_process). @types/node is pinned to 18.19.70 in e2e/package.json.
how_to_remove: Not removable — Node.js built-in APIs have no JS replacement. The version pin (18.x) could be updated to match the minimum Node engine (>=20.10.0). No removal path exists while the project uses Node.js built-ins.
replacement_reason: @types/node is essential for typing Node.js built-in modules and globals in the e2e package.
